channel.title: Group buys & ICs · keyboard newswire
channel.description: Live group buys and interest checks from Geekhack and partner vendors.

item.title: [Instock] BSUN Usagi/537 Linear Switch/How's BSUN now?
item.description: https://discord.gg/9PjWsc3Dxb BSUN Usagi/537 In the recent switch market, HMX and Keygeek have been making headlines with their new releases, materials, and molding improvements. It seems people are forgetting our old friend: BSUN. BSUN has been slow in releasing new switches during the past few months, but there is a good reason for it. I will quickly introduce you to the BSUN Usagi linear switches, and after that, we will be looking at the major improvements BSUN has made during the past few months. Thank you for reading. Price Price：0.35USD/each BSUN Usagi/537 Linear Switch Specifications S — 13061 pts · 2 comments · Geekhack · Group Buys

item.title: [IC] DCS Holy Caster
item.description: DCS Holy Caster | About | DCS Holy Caster is a set that Shark (Bord Designs) and I (VictoriaRose) are collaborating on! This set is based off Shuna from Tensura/That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime The Kitting is subject to feedback/suggestions! Interest Check Form Colors: Kitting: Base: Numpad: Spacebars: Interest Check Form Vendors: US: TBD Canada: Nyxkeys UK: ProtoTypist EU: CoffeeKeys China: TypistClub SEA: Ktechs Fulfillment: TBD Join the Discord for more in-depth updates! Bord Design Discord — 9399 pts · 12 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] Dyad TKL & Pad
item.description: Hello everyone/你好 It’s been a while, dumboy here. Fulfillment for the first chapter, Début: Diversity, was completed last year. Thanks to your incredible support, everything went according to plan. And the keeb gained a lot of compliments. Nearly a year has passed since the Diversity IC:re. It is finally time to move forward and unveil what’s behind the next curtain. Here it is, scene 1: Dyad. Exploded view Specifications Layout: F12 TKL Mounting: Plate oring Size: 359.61 mm * 136.01 mm (TKL) / 88.15 mm * 136.01 mm (Pad) Weight(Unbuilt): 2.52kg (TKL) / 0.55kg (Pad) Front height: 18.90mm (TKL&P — 21611 pts · 16 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] DCS VoC (Violet on Cream)
item.description: DCS VoC Hey earthlings, Bringing you a classic VoC colorway, but reworked in an objectively better profile (fight me). I've been wanting baul (paulgali) to run this set for a while, but pricing and other circumstances kept it from launching. So I'm picking up where that left off. Hope you all enjoy it! IC Form Details Material: ABS Legends: Doubleshot Colors: RDE, WCK Vendors US: CA: EU: UK: Proto[Typist] KR: CN: Typist Club SG: iLumkb OCE: Kits Renders F1-8X by GEON Vero by AKB W1-AT by GEON Socials Discord Instagram Thanks Baul for handing me the baton Hiney for original permission You for r — 628 pts · 3 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] DCS Yue Lao | Cancelled for now.
item.description: Welcome to the Interest Check for DCS Yue Lao “An invisible red thread connects those who are destined to meet, regardless of time, place, or circumstance. The thread may stretch or tangle, but will never break.” This set is inspired by Yue Lao (月老), the god of marriage and love in Chinese mythology and the story of the red thread of fate. Yue Lao has an image of an old man that appears at night under the moon. Every Qixi Festival (七夕), he will be given a book filled with names of people that are single. And it is his duty to find the best match for each person, then tie the ends of the red th — 19329 pts · 31 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] DCS Handarbeit - In GB now! (June 19th - July 19th)
item.description: DCS Handarbeit Inspired by G81-3000HBD OG Handarbeit keyboard. Using the DCS profile from Signatures Plastics, that we know and love, to bring modern kitting with a Gorton twist! IC FORM closed Vendors US: CannonKeys EU: OBLOTZKY UK: ProtoTypist SG: Ktechs CN: Typist Club KR: GEONWORKS GB Info Live June 19th - July 19th! Pricing Cannonkeys and TypistClub will be offering MOQ price breaks on the base kit. Base: $120/100MOQ - $115/150MOQ - $110/200MOQ Ext: $55 Numpad: $45 Bars $35 UK Iso: $20 WASD: $20 BAE: $12 10u: $8 Kit Renders Comprehensive base kit. Extension kit adding support for alternat — 27039 pts · 33 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] GMK Black Cherry | TRANSFER OF OWNERSHIP
item.description: GMK CYL BLACK CHERRY **PLEASE READ** Hello everyone, for the better of this project, I have decided to transfer ownership of this project to Valkurize! I have decided to transfer ownership because this set has been sitting in IC for a looooooooong time and it has gone no where since. With that being said, I would like to apologize. I'm sorry for leaving this IC unattended and not giving you all the proper updates that you deserve. I also apologize to all the interested vendors who have been waiting for me to reach out to them regarding this project. I feel awful for having it gone this far and — 83201 pts · 49 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] HMX Swift Linear Switch/Cloud switch's baby brother
item.description: Discord:https://discord.gg/xprJb8Ta26 Hi everyone, this is the IC for another new HMX linear switch: The Swift linear switch. The Swift switches only came out a bit later than the Cloud switches which are already in stock on our website. I consider them to be brother switches or sister switches, and the reason is that they were both made with HMX's new MX molding, both have an LY stem, and both have a 4.0mm bottom out (or 3.9mm to be precise). The only difference between these two switches is their housing materials, and please allow me to elaborate on that later. Price Price: 0.35 USD per swi — 8065 pts · 5 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [GB] GMK Noire - Shipping
item.description: Welcome to the GMK Noire GB Thread This set will be Live: October 4, 2020 - November 4, 2020 Est. shipping time: Q2 2021 (production lead time ~34 weeks + sample verification) Inspired by a need for a set that would work well on as many boards as possible, regardless of design, layout, budget or color; and inspired by midcentury modern and minimalist design, GMK Noire is currently live on the following vendor sites: USA: Project Keyboard Canada: Deskhero EU: Oblotzky Industries Asia: iLumkb Australia: Daily Clack Manufacturer: GMK Profile: Cherry Sculpt: 1/1/2/3/4/4 Plastic: ABS Kitting and Pr — 50204 pts · 49 comments · Geekhack · Group Buys

item.title: [IC] MW Norse|ABS 2SHOT
item.description: MW Norse Background Hello everyone, MilkywayKeys here. Thank you all for the continued support. We’re excited to officially share that we’re collaborating with Skok on MW Norse ABS Doubleshot. Since the release of GMK Norse, quite some time has passed. With MW Norse, our goal is not simply to reproduce a familiar theme, but to build on it with new ideas, new details, and a fresh perspective, while preserving the character that made the original so well loved. We’ll reveal more as the project moves forward. Thank you again for the support, and we look forward to hearing your thoughts. BASE To g — 11719 pts · 7 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [iC] GMK CYL ❖ Death Knight ❖
item.description: GMK CYL Death Knight "The Pact is sealed!" Inspired by the death knight hero class from W*rcr*ft MMORPG and its digital collectible card variant The primary colors of this set, attributing death knight’s characteristics, are: Dark scarlet, grey and dark blue, while the red, blue and green each represent DK class’ primary runes: ♥ Blood , ❖ frost and ✦ unholy . For the modifier legends, I opted to choose a full icon mods , which I think compliments the theme visually and aesthetically, with or without the novelties. IC Form Colors Modifier: Custom black-blue Alphas: Custom dark ruby Red legend — 15581 pts · 10 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [GB] MW STONE Age (GB CLOSED)
item.description: Hello everyone! I would like to introduce this new keycaps design： MW-STONE Age GB on April 9th - May 20th Lead time in 2022 Q4. ※ Perchase Link US - Mechs & Co. CA - KanataKeys EU - mykeyboard.eu UK - Proto[Typist] SEA - iLumkb KR - KLC OCE - DailyClack MX - Rheset Worldwide - zFrontier QK65 STONE-Age edition gb will be started today through QwertyKeys Accurate GB time in your region Renders Gellary Sales Information ※ Inspiration More The inspiration and color scheme came from Japanese anim Dr Stone's main character: Ishigami Senkuu ※ Kitting ※ Deskmats Thanks stellaidoscope for this awesome — 13355 pts · 10 comments · Geekhack · Group Buys

item.title: [Preorder] MB-44 v2 - 40% Keyboard [Nov 8th - Dec 8th]
item.description: MB-44 v2 is now available for pre-order! MB-44 v2 Keyboard Kits are available for $325 USD during pre-order For NA: MelonBred Keyboards For Japan/Asia: Yushakobo For EU: Keeb.Supply Spec Sheet What's included in the kit? MB-44 v2 case in Silver, Strawberry Milk (pink), and Marimo (deep green) PCB mainboard, S1 UDB, and cable FR4 universal plate Hardware, Geon Tadpoles, and case feet Pre-Order Information Pre-order will take place from November 8 to December 8 or until sold out at a reduced price of $325 USD . The MB-44 v2 keyboard kit will again be available for orders at a price of $350 USD a — 8198 pts · 4 comments · Geekhack · Group Buys

item.title: [GB] KKB Korean Delights | 17th July 2026
item.description: Korean Delights A timeless bite of sweetness and tradition Introduction These traditional korean desserts, better known as hangwa, offer a timeless bite of sweetness and tradition, right at your finger tips. Kia ora and a warm welcome to the group buy for Korean Delights! This has been in the works for ages and I am glad to announce its release! Originally this was ran through tomocaps under the name "Hangwa" and Keebzncables bought the license off of them to run our own version, however due to some time constraints Keebzncables has been kind enough to let me run this set myself under this new — 9621 pts · 1 comments · Geekhack · Group Buys

item.title: [IC] DOE 60% - An absolutely symmetrical Alice
item.description: Hey everyone, this is Hare. Join Discord of Hare Works Today I’m bringing you a long-awaited new kit IC: DOE60% a quick glance over the DOE60% This keyboard features fully symmetrical layout and frame design, shaped like an open book placed in front of your monitor. Below are prototype samples of the DOE. Huge thanks to all my friends who lent a hand during my extremely busy year. The core colorways for the DOE are finalized as listed below, with full layout options available for all variants. Final shades will be confirmed when the group buy launches. 1.Harbor Gray 2.Robin's Egg Blue 3.Platin — 10997 pts · 11 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] Code:002 TKL Keyboard
item.description: Code:002 TKL Hello everybody, Sinner here. Finally making the step to posting an IC on GeekHack. Code:002TKL has been a project that I've been working on together with a friend Raimi for a good year and we are finally ready to share it out with you guys. After two prototypes we are happy with the design and we want others to be able to enjoy it as well. Price is dependant on the MOQ hit, and is subject to change. Expected range of 550-725 USD (25-50 MOQ). IC will be open for 1 month to gauge the numbers and interest. Group buy is expected to open in September 2026. Currently one vendor: Cafege — 3630 pts · 5 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

Better luck next time! 2020-11-16: GB start Vendors US: Dixie Mech Europe: CandyKeys Canada: Deskhero Oceania: Daily Clack China: zFrontier (EN) China: zFrontier (CN) Southeast Asia: IlumKB ⬤ Welcome to the GMK ThinkCaps Group buy! ⬤ GMK ThinkCaps is a keycap set inspired by the classic ThinkPad and IBM/Lenovo Preferred Pro keyboards. From Nov. 16 to Dec. 13 , 2020. ETA 28+ weeks after PO Technical Specs Cherry MX compatible Cherry profile (112344) Doubleshot ABS plastic Manu — 135272 pts · 49 comments · Geekhack · Group Buys

item.title: [GB] DCS UFO | Shipping June 2026!
item.description: DCS UFO Group buy: 2nd–15th February 2026. Now closed! ETA: Q2 2026 Is there life out there?! Who knows! But with DCS UFO you can bring some extraterrestrial life straight to your keyboard... Updates: 7th July 2026: GB orders have shipped and extras will be up shortly. Thanks all! 22nd May 2026: It's tiiiiime!! Sets are shipping to vendors in the coming days. 4th May 2026: They're finishing up. Kitting needs to be collated and the kits are going to ship to vendors in the next ~2 weeks. 8th April 2026: I have received word that the plastic shipment has arrived, and UFO is in production! 26th Ma — 20710 pts · 31 comments · Geekhack · Group Buys

item.title: [IC] KKB Cobalt - US/UK/FR/DE base kits! | New vendor!
item.description: Hello everyone! I would like to introduce to you this little project I've been working on for the past 6 months. (renders by MiKeyDigit) >>>> Interest Check Form <<<< Please if possible fill out this form and leave your feedback, it helps a lot. ● Intro ● Hi everyone! Here is KKB Cobalt , my first keycap project. I have set out to release a set of keycaps because of the frustration I had seeing so many beautiful sets releasing (more specifically made of quality ABS) - but none in my local layout which I love, so I ended up asking myself "why not giving it a try?" and here we are. Of course, it — 14469 pts · 26 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] GMK CYL TA NEO - Returning a Classic, again!
item.description: jomes sandkeys ic form Why? Both baul (paul) and I want this. It is as simple as that. A classic set that we believe should make a comeback. Made with the original - GMK. What's not to like? Still a collaboration with baul, just relaunched IC to reflect manufacturer change & kitting changes. Kitting Base kit Based kit Deutsche mods Nordeuk kit Forties kit Colors Colors will be matched to GMK TA90 colors. Yes, we have the caps. Pricing TBD Vendors US - Divinikey EU - Oblotzky UK - ProtoTypist SEAS - ILumKB OCE - Daily Clack China - Zfrontier Korea - GeonWorks Renders 480p by remiremiremiremirem — 15404 pts · 36 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [GB] LM65 V3 - A 65% screwless, simple silicone mount and plateless option
item.description: LM65 V3 Group Buy Launching Group Buy GB Name LM - The name was inspired by my daughter Liz Maria that help me on every build and already like them (since 2022). Inspiration After too many 60%, LM60, LM60 V2 and Lariat, now a 65% that I always desire to have one. Start and End Date Sep-15-2025 to Oct-15-2025 Estimated Fulfillment Date 30-40 days, after GB ends. Nov/2025. We need to sell at least 15-20 sets to make GB happen (5 sets already sold to my friends). Since 2022 with LM60 we have already made and delivered more than 150 cases/keyboards with full support and warranty. Details LM65 V3 i — 4426 pts · 1 comments · Geekhack · Group Buys

item.title: [IC]MW- Philosopher's Stone| GB expected June 25th.
item.description: MW- Philosopher's Stone https://forms.gle/vqfdphj8uccuhQN46 Inspired by medieval alchemical manuscripts, this keycap set distills the symbols, apparatus, and philosophical core of the alchemical world into every tiny keycap. It also incorporates elements from the anime Fullmetal Alchemist; the color scheme features base tones of base metals blended with gold, plus accents of burgundy to complete the design. Info Manufacturer: Milkyway Material: ABS+PC Production Method: Double injection(UV sublegend inside) + novelty kit are screen printing Profile: Cherry profile Sample Renders Kitting Update — 16735 pts · 13 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] Marigold60 | Engraving Suggestions Welcome!
item.description: Marigold60 Interest Check Story One of the great things about custom keyboards, aside from the sound and feel, is the visual appeal. There is something special in keyboard design, considering that such simple shapes possess so much character. I was long fascinated by this, in particular the engraved weights, which always left a strong impression on me. It truly is an elegance unique to this community. Around a year ago, I wished that keyboards would externalize this beauty, rather than hiding it underneath–that was how this project began. As a solo designer, it has been a long journey for me. — 3347 pts · 2 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] KKB Triumph Adler Neo | Returning a classic
item.description: KKB Triumph Adler Neo SKME Discord MASJE Discord IC FORM WHY??? Both James and I want this. It is as simple as that. A classic set that we believe should make a comeback. Keykobo at this point have been putting out a good product in a reasonable time frame. What's not to like?! Colors We will be matching to the original. I will have my hands on this when I return on July 10, and then we can proceed. Kitting Target prices are subject to updates. The key thing to note, despite kits being split, is trying to get a 'full base' at $95 . Base kit - $72 estimate Numpad - $13 estimate Addons, includin — 65479 pts · 49 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [LIVE] TAIKO-01 100% Funded on Kickstarter in <8 hours
item.description: Edit: Kickstart is now LIVE! TAIKO 01 just hit its Kickstarter funding goal and we are absolutely buzzing right now. Early bird discount won't last much longer It's only until tonight. Grab it while you can for $300 at $100 off MSRP: https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/taikohub/taiko-01-keyboard With the TAIKO 01 keyboard, you're getting a battle tested design that's been iterated on for the last 4 years over >120 users. QMK compatible, hotswappable, curved keyboard with an incredibly ergonomic thumb cluster that's designed around hand anatomy. Best of all, there's a 1 year warranty and a 30 — 14294 pts · 11 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [GB] GMK CYL Gonzales | ENDS TODAY!
item.description: Inspiration? This set is inspired by one of my friends who always wears black outfits and has had a lavender phone case, his name is Gonzales. That's all. GB Period: May 4th - June 3rd Estimated Ship Date: 4 months after GB closes Vendors(links when they will start): US - Divinikey CN - KBDfans UK - proto[Typist] EU - eloquentclicks CA - Deskhero SG - Ktechs AU - Switchkeys KR - Swagkeys Colors GMK CR RAL 290 60 25 Discord Server - for more updates and suggestions about the future of the project. Here are the kits - all renders done by me. Base Kit - 135$ Why cadet sublegends? His favorite son — 8936 pts · 10 comments · Geekhack · Group Buys

item.title: [IC] DBD x GSD CCRE TKL
item.description: CCRE TKL Excited to launch the IC for the CCRE TKL I've been working on for the past 6 or so months. After a couple of rounds of prototypes and revisions, I'm finally happy with the design and sound. The CCRE TKL is based on DesignedByDark's CCRX open-source design , which uses a modified Ex: Ecliptica spring leaf top-mount plate. My rendition brings sharpened styling, a large through weight with acoustic perforations, internal acoustic grooves, universal right-side USB PCB support, and gummy o-ring mount to the keyboard. A full list of changes is available in the project channel in my server — 810 pts · 4 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] GMK CYL Desert Nights | CN Vendor Added
item.description: GMK CYL Desert Nights Inspired by the desert sky and all the stars. Novelties and Deskmat feature classic landscapes and critters while all set on a background of glitter. Please fill out the IC form as it is the best way to gauge interest and suggestions: FORM Please consider following on Instagram for updates as well Sparkles Implementation This set will utilise sparkles from GMK that help represent stars in the night sky. Sparkles has been a point of contention on a few sets, so that is the main question being asked in the IC. Addtionally, samples will 100% be needed, which will come when v — 17778 pts · 27 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

Designer Discord Group Buy Info: Date: June 17th to July 16th Delivery Estimate: Q4 2026 Vendors: US: NovelKeys CN: KBDFans UK: Proto[Typist] SEA: iLumkb EU: Oblotzky Pricing: If we hit 250moq, this set will get custom packaging similar to DCS Panels. item.title: Beam Spring 104+SSK+122+62 Reproduction Project! now shipping
item.description: Today is the public launch of the Brand New Beam Spring Keyboards Project! For those not familiar, I also coordinate and continue to mail out all of the Brand New Model F Keyboards, a project which has more than $1.6 million in orders so far, and will continue to mail them out before the beam spring project continues. To repeat, the new beam springs don't ship and are not a focus until I've sent out the new Model F Keyboards. This project is based on reservations. You need to sign up on the interest form to reserve your Beam Spring Keyboard so please sign up if interested. I expect to offer th — 430121 pts · 49 comments · Geekhack · Group Buys

item.title: [IC]KBS-Acid house R2
item.description: KBS-Acid House VER.Seishin Osen IC Form: https://forms.gle/2Rx8MMF5Cj48oFDJ7 Inspired by hallucinogenic mushrooms, this keycap set blends psychedelic visuals and distorted consciousness into a bold custom aesthetic. Seishin Osen – Japanese for “mental contamination” – symbolizes a silent invasion of the mind. Like the effect of fly agaric, reality warps, colors blaze, and lines melt into motion. Spirals, afterimages, fluorescent glows and twisted textures define its visual language. Paired with high-contrast neon tones, it creates an eerie beauty where dreams and reality blur. More than keycap — 9334 pts · 11 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC]KKB-Cross Impact | Vendors list Update
item.description: KKB-Cross Impact IC form | Discord | Discord-KeyKoBo - Please help me to fill out this form and provide any feedback that you have, super thank you - If you are interested in being a vendor, please contact me on Discord. Inspiration Inspired by the cold, divine moon of Neon Genesis Evangelion, this design merges its quiet apocalyptic tension with Y3K’s sharp, futuristic style. The chrome finish echoes the lunar surface, while low-saturation blue reflections capture moonlight’s serene glow. Stripped of excess, four-point stars reimagine the moon as if wrapped in the Cross Impact—reinterpreting — 21568 pts · 21 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC]KAP-Retro:CAT
item.description: KAP-Retro:CAT IC form | Discord | Discord-Keyreative - Please help me to fill out this form and provide any feedback that you have, super thank you - If you are interested in being a vendor, please contact me on Discord. This set is inspired by the keyboard of Canon Cat, the word processor invented by HCI pioneer Jef Raskin. Launched in 1987, this vintage device fully embodies the philosophy of The Humane Environment. It abandons mice, menus and redundant keys, delivering modeless efficient editing via streamlined layout shortcuts. We extract native layout command abbreviations including scali — 204 pts · 1 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] MW 仮想|ABS 2SHOT
item.description: MW 仮想 Backgrand Hello everyone, this is MW~ We are honored to collaborate with designer KEi on MW 仮想. This is our first project together, and we believe it marks the beginning of a great partnership. Colorway For this set, the designer chose black, white, and gray as the base colors for the keycaps. Highly saturated purple, magenta, and cyan are used across the legends, novelties, and alpha accents to create a bold and vivid contrast. The set will be produced in ABS double-shot, with UV printing applied to selected keys. The physical samples shown here were matched using real GMK and SP color — 236 pts · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [GB] DCS Vintage Motorsport
item.description: Glare 65 by Geon works. This set is inspired by the famous Gulf Livery, shown below. This set is designed to be an "R2" to my previous set, SA Motorsport Selectric. Based on a multitude of requests to do this in a cylindrical profile, I am doing it in DCS, using stock Signature Plastic Colors. Group Buy June 12- July 6 Designer Discord Designer Instagram Kitting Kitting is designed to ensure that the Base Kit covers the majority of use cases as parsimoniously as possible. I am adding the UK as part of the base because UK people typically like my sets, and the quotes worked. Accepted some feedb — 2453 pts · 9 comments · Geekhack · Group Buys

item.title: (IC) KŌBŌ ISSHI  Exploring Stone as a 65% Keyboard
item.description: Hello Everyone, What began as a simple curiosity with stone evolved into a two year-long obsession. Today, I’m proud to present the KOSANJI case — a 65% exploration into marble as a keyboard. Available in both Carrara White and India Green. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Specifications 仕様 Layout Compatible with most 65% PCBs and plates, including KDFans’ DZ65 and YMD-65% ZJ68 by YMDK Dimensions 340 × 145 mm Typing Angle 6° Front Height ~20 m — 2344 pts · 10 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC]Supernova 60% - What is SonoShell
item.description: Supernova SENSY This GB will be launched simultaneously worldwide. Hello world, this is SENSY. Here we go. Seal TKL Chinese GB and Smoke65 international GB have all be shipped out, and now is the perfect time for us to unveil our new design. Since its Chinese release, the Smoke65 has won recognition from many friends. We would like to express our sincere gratitude to everyone who has supported us. Many friends have been asking about leftover stock or a Round 2 re-run. From our brand perspective, our Lab line is built to continuously launch fresh designs—we have no plans for any R2 reruns. Even — 1916 pts · 5 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [GB] Keykobo X Pixtendo Lab - Pixel 67 Keyboard
item.description: Unikeys: https://discord.gg/sFAezFTBpp Keykobo: https://discord.gg/YDHeEw6W69 Pixel 67 Keyboard Kit Hello everyone, Thank you for all the feedback during the Pixel67 IC. After reviewing the comments and making final adjustments, Pixel67 is now ready for Group Buy. Based on the stream feedback, we have made the following updates for the GB version: 1. Fully built kits will include extra ISO keys, split backspace keys, and Mac system keys, 7U spacebar keycap etc. 2. The front case text will be simplified. We will remove the more complex decorative text and keep only the "Pixel67" name at the top — 157 pts · Geekhack · Group Buys

item.title: [IC] GMK Spark - GB Dates, Pricing, Kitting Updated!
item.description: GB May 22 to June 21 I would like to present: Spark GMK Spark delivers a burst of energy and nostalgia through electric color, playful accents, and a shockingly familiar identity. Designed for flexibility, Spark can shift between two distinct looks. Go bold with accent-driven configurations that bring out its personality, or keep it clean with a balanced approach that pairs vibrant alphas with deeper modifier keys for a timeless, everyday setup. UPDATE May 6 Removed Alphas Kit, not enough demand. Trimmed some custom keys to reduce cost. Base now includes 6-key 40’s keys. Base now includes both — 16556 pts · 26 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] DCS Vintage Motorsport- Group Buy June 12- July 6
item.description: Glare 65 by Geon works. This set is inspired by the famous Gulf Livery, shown below. This set is designed to be an "R2" to my previous set, SA Motorsport Selectric. Based on a multitude of requests to do this in a cylindrical profile, I am doing it in DCS, using stock Signature Plastic Colors. It is important to note that the blue and orange for the Gulf livery weren't consistent. The blue went between a powder blue, "workshirt" blue, and a seafoam green in some incarnations of the livery. The orange is between a more "marigold" (Yellow Orange) and a more "vermillion" (Red Orange), depending o — 3714 pts · 8 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] OF Studio  OF1 60% Keyboard Kit
item.description: OF Studio - OF1 60% Keyboard Hi everyone, We’re excited to share an early look at the OF1 Keyboard Kit by OF Studio. This project is entering the final stage before launch, and we’d love to gather feedback from the community. Project Overview The OF1 is a fully realized keyboard project with mass production already completed, positioning it as a low-risk group buy with a fast turnaround. Unlike traditional GBs, this is closer to a ready-to-ship model, with only final configurations remaining before launch. Keyboard Specs Specifications Layout: 60% (WKL / HHKB / WK) Typing Angle: 8° Front Heigh — 3773 pts · 4 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] DCS Dolch [Final Update, Est GB-May]
item.description: Why? Being a huge fan of Dolch,I wanted to bring this classic colourway to life in DCS profile. IC Form || Discord || Instagram Full Album Kits Collaborations SEAL 80: DOLCH EDITION In partnership with Sensy. We made a special version of the Seal 80 aptly named the Dolch Editon . We will conduct a more detailed IC for this later once prototypes are completed. A separate GB will be conducted once everything is finalized, more information will be added soon. The purchase of a Base kit will qualify you for the purchase of the keyboard. DESKMATS Dolchmats ,in partnership with Keebpixel.:cool They — 40485 pts · 49 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] GMK CYL Icon Beige
item.description: Intro Hello old Cherry lovers, this is sumjoy, I’m so glad to tell u that old style Cherry is coming. Here it is, GMK CYL Icon Beige, a set that follows the classic looking of the keycaps from Cherry G80-2100 which is my favorite Cherry keyboard. (Personally, I opened a GB two months ago, and I was bothered with finding a set of keycaps to match with it) The brown Diversity(2100 top) matched with original G80-2100 HDD keycaps. IC Form Kits Base Kit Base kit render is made based on G80-2100 HAG. Extension Kit DE Kit Macro Kit 40s Kit Note: all the icons and texts on shinethroughs, front print o — 27251 pts · 41 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] Matter 65
item.description: By Chq.works Instagram IC form ***Render*** A 65% keyboard with PC case with solid copper/brass weight as a middle piece. Hi guys, this is CHQ . I'm originally trained as an interior and furniture designer, but over the past several years, I’ve immersed myself in the world of custom mechanical keyboards. Driven by my fascination with the beauty, sound, and tactile experience of keyboards, I designed this board to reflect my personal preferences and needs. During its development, I discovered the Mechanical Keyboard Design Competition (MKDC) and decided to enter and was honored as one of the wi — 9125 pts · 9 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] GMK CYL Blanks
item.description: GMK CYL Blanks Hello guys This set is pretty straightforward: no legends, no letters, no fonts. Just colored blank keycaps. IC Form Details Material: ABS Legends: TBC, I’ll check with GMK to see if they have blank molds for all the keys, and whether singleshot is doable. Colors: CR, L9, U9, V1, N7, V4, CV, TU2, DY, MG1 Profile: R1 R1 R2 R3 R4 R4 Kits - Please keep in mind that this is an IC, kitting may be cut or added depending on the response. Renders Amano by h40 Vero by AKB Petrichor by AKB Frog TKL by GEON Socials Discord Instagram Thanks You for reading — 9964 pts · 20 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [GB] GMK CYL Prussian Alert | May 15th - June 12th
item.description: Over two years after the initial IC, and with the main goal of bringing the Prussian Blue colorway back to life accomplished, GMK CYL Prussian Alert is finally here! Featuring OG Icon modifiers and a custom grey/white base in place of the usual Text+Icon and beige, the set perfectly complements the Prussian Blue tone. And if you’re into Cyrillic and low-contrast aesthetics, the alternative Alpha Kit is an absolute chef’s kiss. Discord Vendors EU: Oblotzky (Lead) UK: Prototypist US: NovelKeys CA: DeskHero KR: Geonworks CN: KBDFans JP: Yushakobo OCE: SwitchKeys SEA: iLumkb IN: NeoMacro Turkiye/M — 5066 pts · 12 comments · Geekhack · Group Buys

GMK Spark delivers a burst of energy and nostalgia through electric color, playful accents, and a shockingly familiar identity. Designed for flexibility, Spark can shift between two distinct looks. Go bold with accent-driven configurations that bring out its personality, or keep it clean with a balanced approach that pairs vibrant alphas with deeper modifier keys for a timeless, everyday setup. item.title: [IC] GMK CYL Dino Jungle - A dinosaur themed keycap set
item.description: Howdy partners! This is the interest check for GMK CYL Dino Jungle! I’m Tristan, but you may know me as Captain Sterling. I appreciate you taking the time to check this out, and I hope you enjoy the set! Learn even more on my WEBSITE or fill out the IC FORM if you're interested in the set. Meet Dino Jungle! Dino Jungle is a dinosaur inspired set dedicated to my son. As of three years ago my son has been really into dinosaurs. We’ve decorated his room, played with tons of toys, and even been to dinosaur exhibits. I’ve been wanting to make something for him for quite a while. So when the GMK Des — 2634 pts · 7 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.description: RF—8X Hey everyone, thanks for taking the time to take a look at this project. It's been a long time coming! GB date: May 25th 2026 – June 8th 2026 Estimated fulfillment Q4 2026 Vendors / Pricing (USD): Alu housing kit - $350 PC top + alu bottom housing kit - $360 Cipulot R1 8-9Xu PCB - $50 Plate - $40 Add-on alu top housing - $200 Add-on pc top housing - $210 Add-on alu bottom housing - $150 SEA (lead): ktechs - https://ktechs.store/products/rf-8x OCE: Toro - https://torokeeb.store/products/rf-8x-housings NA: Omnitype - https://omnitype.com/collections/rf-8x EU: Coffeekeys - https://coffeekey — 278 pts · 2 comments · Geekhack · Group Buys

item.title: [GB] GMK Iconographic - GB Postponed, Updates to follow
item.description: INSPIRATION The inspiration for the set is the album cover for Floral Shoppe and the Iconography of ancient times that are a cornerstone of Vaporwave Aesthetics. WHERE TO BUY: North America: Mechs & Co Europe: MyKeyboard Australia & Oceania: Dailyclack South East Asia: Monokei Canada: Deskhero China: Zfrontier EN / Zfrontier CN A note on pricing: Following deciding kit pricing in November, the dollar has fallen from .85 to .81 to the euro, which effectively means a loss of 6 euros per basekit on the old pricing versus then. For this reason we were forced to increase US pricing in order to main — 97439 pts · 49 comments · Geekhack · Group Buys

item.title: [IC] RF8X by keyhub - A minimalist elegant housing for the Realforce R1 & R2
item.description: Hi everyone! My name is keekeen. I’m a fellow “Topre” / rubber dome enjoyer. For me, the journey began with the HHKB, which I consider my first "end game" keyboard. Today, I am thrilled to introduce a passion project that’s been in the works: RF—8X by keyhub.design This is a custom 80% electro-capacitive keyboard housing that merges the classic design of Topre's Realforce R1 with the aesthetic legacy of the XRF by the now-defunct Noxary. The motivation of the project is deeply personal: it started as a way to support friends who were unfortunately victims of the Noxary scam, combined with my o — 23551 pts · 30 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] GMK CYL Gambit - Now with N9 (Dolch)!
item.description: GMK CYL Gambit Play Chess! R1 1u Doubleshot ABS chess novelties keycaps — Iconic chess pieces for OG/Timeless GMK sets. Ideal for accents, XT/Macro rows, or simply just play chess with. When TBA - - - Disclaimer - - - Renders may not picture actual colors of the keycaps but if you happen to have GMK stock color in your possession then the colors are the exact match of the said colors. IC Form The Kit 16 doubleshot line-only and fill-only chess pieces, each in WoB, BoW, Beige and Dolch keycaps color and legend colors, as well as 3C and 3B beige accents color. All GMK stock colors (CR, WS1, L9, — 12600 pts · 20 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] GMK CYL Dinokidz - ROARRR
item.description: Hello dino lovers, I'd like to introduce you to the already extinct, GMK CYL Dinokidz. Inspired by Dinokidz keyboard , featuring legends from Extended 2048. The idea was to bring back a bit of that old-school, playful feeling and turn it into a keycap set. Hope you guys like the set! IC Form Vendors US: Bowl Keyboards CA: EU: Delta Key Co. UK: Proto[Typist] KR: CN: KBDFans SG: iLumkb AU: Keebz N Cables Details Material: ABS Legends: Doubleshot & UV print Colors: Matched to original keycaps Kits Renders **Note**: Please refer to kit renders for a better depiction of the keyset. item.title: [GB] DSS Distortion 40s
item.description: Echo by beardgrylls (of the black parade) Description This is the Group buy for the DSS Distortion 40s kit! This set features vibrant pink legends and accents inspired by the aesthetics of early punk rock albums. This set is designed for maximum compatibility with small keyboards, including standard QAZ layouts like the vault. This set will go on sale on April 13th and run until May 15th. MOQ of 50 @ 110 USD Vendors US- SabreKeebs UK- ProtoTypist EU- Keeb.Supply AUS/OCO- Keebz N Cables Renders F1-40 by Geon MB-44 by MelonBred QAZ V4N4GON by Trash Man Designer Discord — 6821 pts · 10 comments · Geekhack · Group Buys

item.title: [IC] ORI 870  Less, but Better
item.description: The sixth design from ORI CLUB ORI 870 — Design Notes This time around, I spent most of the process refining rather than reinventing—shaping the design language that Ori will carry forward. With the 870, I challenged myself to design with more restraint: something more practical, more daily. But minimalism is never the easier path—when there's nothing left to hide behind, every decision has to stand on its own. In the design process, from the very beginning—even when just thinking about form—I had countless shapes come to mind. I spent the majority of my time narrowing them down, searching for — 12879 pts · 18 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [GB] NicePBT Youmu - CK x Touhou Project - LAST DAY
item.description: Sup, it's 2026 and I'm still at it. This time bringing you an officially licensed Touhou set themed after Konpaku Youmu! The set was designed by myself in collaboration with CannonKeys and manufactured by NicePBT. The inspiration is based on the more modern depiction of Youmu (TH17) with a lighter shade of green (and a slightly bluer hue). Big shoutout to my boy OneCreativeMind/ocm as always for helping with the novelty keycap designs. Shoutout to Starbottle for the 1u/deskmat illustration. https://touhou-project.news/news/16738/ Photo by: keima Kit: GB is now live and ends May 10th. ETA is cu — 5700 pts · 3 comments · Geekhack · Group Buys

item.title: [IC]YuRui HE Switch
item.description: Hello, this is Moyu.studio ﻿ This time, we bring you a lightweight, high-performance magnetic switch - Yurui HE switch Yurui HE switch specification Top Housing: PC Bottom Housing: Nylon Stem: POM Spring: 20mm Total Travel: 3.6±0.2mm Operating Force: 37±2g Bottom-out Force: 42±2g Bottom-out Magnetic Flux: 630±40GS Lubed At the beginning of the design, we aimed to create a high-performance, long-lasting HE switch with a high level of appearance and cost-effectiveness. After trying several springs, we chose to customize this 42g extended spring. The design of the extended spring can make the swi — 1067 pts · 2 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks
